
# Opportunities for PhD research {#phd}

There are several routes into doing a PhD. This page describes routes avaialble at the University of Manchester, including AI at Manchester shown in figure \@ref(fig:aimanc-fig).


```{r aimanc-fig, echo = FALSE, fig.align = "center", out.width = "100%", fig.cap = "(ref:captionaimanc)"}
knitr::include_graphics("images/ai-at-manchester.jpeg")
```

(ref:captionaimanc) The University of Manchester’s [AI@Manchester](https://www.idsai.manchester.ac.uk) theme, part of the Digital Futures platform (formerly the Institute for Data Science & Artificial Intelligence) is an access point to the University’s expertise in data science and artificial intelligence. It facilitates interactions between researchers and problem holders, owns the University’s data science strategy, and delivers sustainable support for the community and is one of several routes into doing a PhD at the University of Manchester. 


## PhD opporunities

For PhD opportunities, see the following links:

* [findaphd.com](https://www.findaphd.com) for opportunities across the UK and beyond
* [ai-decisions-cdt.ac.uk](https://www.ai-decisions-cdt.ac.uk) UKRI funded Centre for Doctoral Training in Decision Making for Complex Systems
* [se.manchester.ac.uk/study/postgraduate-research](https://www.se.manchester.ac.uk/study/postgraduate-research/) More opportunities across the Faculty of Science and Engineering at the University of Manchester
